title: Actifresh Nitrile Coated Gloves
shortDescription: High abrasion and cut hazards. High dexterity. Sanitized treatment suppresses the reproduction of microbes, such as bacteria and fungi and hinders both the unpleasant odours as well as material damage from mildew
